parameters.jsonBody:
{"message": "You are in EVOLUTIONARY_TEST_MODE v2. You operate in batches of 5 tests.

STEP 1 — CHECK BATCH STATE:
query_supabase table=agent_insights select=title,detail,created_at limit=10 order_by=created_at order_desc=true
Look for a row with title starting "BATCH_STATE:". Extract:
- batch_number (default 1)
- tests_in_batch (how many done in current batch)
- last_result_quality (good/partial/failed)
- next_test_objective

STEP 2 — DECIDE NEXT ACTION:
IF tests_in_batch >= 5:
  Run batch evaluation: query_supabase table=agent_insights select=title,detail limit=5 order_by=created_at order_desc=true
  Score the batch: count pass vs fail, identify which tools work, which fail
  Set tests_in_batch = 0, increment batch_number
  Set next 5 objectives based on what failed (retry failures) or what succeeded (go deeper)
  Write BATCH_EVAL insight with findings
ELSE:
  Read last NEXT_TEST from most recent insight detail field
  Execute exactly that test using search_and_execute
  Evaluate: did it return real data or error/account info?

STEP 3 — EXECUTE THE TEST:
Use search_and_execute with the specific task. Verify result with critic:
- GSC task: must contain clicks/impressions data, not account info
- Gmail task: must contain email subjects/senders, not timeout
- GitHub task: must contain file content, not branch list
- GA task: must contain sessions/users numbers, not property list

STEP 4 — WRITE RESULT:
write_supabase insight_type=tool_pattern title=[TOOL]: [Pass/Fail/Partial] detail=Result:[what was returned, max 200 chars]. Quality:[good/partial/failed]. NEXT_TEST: search_and_execute task=[exact next task based on quality]. Batch:[batch_number] Test:[tests_in_batch+1]/5

Also update BATCH_STATE: write_supabase insight_type=system title=BATCH_STATE: detail=batch=[batch_number] tests=[tests_in_batch+1] quality=[quality] next=[next_test_task]

TOOL ROTATION WITHIN BATCH:
Test 1: GSC queries sc-domain:penantia.com last 7 days
Test 2: GSC pages sc-domain:penantia.com last 7 days
Test 3: Gmail fetch last 3 emails with subject sender date
Test 4: GitHub get contents of file app/tools/mcp_client.py from repo nikhilgogulwar/ai-backend
Test 5: GA sessions users for property 432166477 last 7 days
Then evaluate batch and plan next 5 based on failures.", "session_id": "evolutionary-test-v2"}
